title: gethyllis lanuginosa
intro: Gethyllis lanuginosa, also known as the woolly gethyllis or hairy gethyllis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Gethyllis lanuginosa is commonly prepared into herbal remedies, such as extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
